title: Issue
description: Issue: An issue belonging to an audit

IssueNumber.description: Issue number to identify this specific issue. This is typically a combination of the audit number and the issue number within its audit.

Priority.description: Priority tag to better categorize your issue  identifying its urgency

Status.description: Status description of the issue (eg open, in progress, closed)

Assign.description: A list of assignees for the issue. These are the individuals / companies responsible for resolving the issue.

Description.description: The scope and nature of the issue

Media.description: Filenames of the images associated with the issue.These must include the file extension.

Position.description: Location of the issue in 3D space in terms of the project's coordinate system Point: Defines a dimensionless location in three-dimensional space.

Comments.description: List of comments made on the issue, identifying either the nature of the issue, the actions being taken to resolve the issue, or the approval / rejection of actions taken.

AuditID.description: Unique ID of Audit the Issue was originally recorded within.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
